# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Please check the table below for which versions of this project are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| master  | :white_check_mark: |
| others  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues. 

Instead, please report them to **cic@umak.edu.ph**. 

You should expect a response within a few days. If the vulnerability is confirmed, we will release a patch as soon as reasonably possible and credit you for the discovery.
